description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wardrobe with a modern, minimalist design. The front features two vertically aligned wooden doors with a natural wood grain finish and slim, vertical bar handles in a metallic tone. The sides and top are finished in a contrasting light gray wood texture, giving the piece a two-tone appearance. The wardrobe stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. The doors are likely hinged, opening outward to reveal internal storage space for clothing or other items. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of engineered wood or laminate, suitable for both residential and urban utility spaces.
description: A tall, two-tone wardrobe with natural wood grain doors and slim metallic handles, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: The back of the wardrobe, finished in a plain light gray surface with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_1: A side view showing the light gray wood texture and the depth of the wardrobe, with no visible handles or doors.
description_view_2: The front view displays two natural wood grain doors with vertical metallic handles, highlighting the main access point.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the light gray wood texture and the wardrobe's depth.
